name: Junction City Raspberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain raspberries and reserve 1 cup of juice.
2. Combine vanilla wafers, sugar, cinnamon and butter; pat into pie plate.
3. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool.
4. Soften gelatin in cold water.
5. Mix reserved raspberry juice, remaining cinnamon and lemon peel with cream. Heat to boiling.
6. Remove from heat and stir in softened gelatin until dissolved.
7. Chill mixture until just beginning to thicken.
8. Whip cream; add vanilla.
9. Fold raspberries, gelatin mixture and whipped cream into pie shell.
10. Chill. Decorate with additional whipped cream if desired.
Source: Missouri Cookin'
